records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ibrahim Ibn Mahziyar
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ibrahim ibn Mahziyar has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Himyari, from Ibrahim ibn Mahziyar.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن إبراهيم بن مهزيار فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحميريّ، عن إبراهيم بن مهزيار.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Yahya Ibn Abi 'imran
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Yahya ibn Abi 'Imran has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Yahya ibn Abi 'Imran. He was a student of Yunus ibn 'Abd Al-Rahman.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن يحيى بن أبي عمران فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن يحيى بن أبي عمران، و كان‌ تلميذ يونس بن عبد الرّحمن‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Masma Ibn Malik Al-Basri
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Everything in this book that is narrated from Masma ibn Malik Al-Basri has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Husayn ibn Said, from Al-Qasim ibn Muhammad, from Aban, from Masma ibn Malik Al-Basri.
He is also known as Masma ibn Abd Al-Malik Al-Basri, and his nickname was Kardin. He was an Arab from Banu Qays ibn Thalabah and was known by the kunya Abu Sayyar. It is reported that when Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) first saw him, he asked: "What is your name?" He replied: "Masma." The Imam asked: "Son of whom?" He replied: "Son of Malik." The Imam said: "Rather, you are Masma ibn Abd Al-Malik."
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن مسمع بن مالك البصريّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسين بن سعيد، عن القاسم بن محمّد عن أبان، عن مسمع بن مالك البصريّ، و يقال له: مسمع بن عبد المالك البصريّ، و لقبه كردين و هو عربيّ من بني قيس بن ثعلبة و يكنّى أبا سيّار، و يقال: إنّ الصادق عليه السّلام قال له أوّل ما رآه: ما اسمك؟ فقال: مسمع فقال: ابن من؟ قال: ابن مالك فقال بل أنت مسمع بن عبد الملك‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn isma'il Ibn bazi'
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Muhammad ibn Isma'il ibn Bazi' has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Muhammad ibn Isma'il ibn Bazi'.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن إسماعيل بن بزيع فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن إسماعيل بن بزيع‌.

records.chapter: Larification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Al-Rayan
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Al-Rayan has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Ali ibn Al-Rayan.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عليّ بن الرّيّان فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن عليّ بن الرّيّان‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Yunus Ibn ya'qub
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Yunus ibn Ya'qub has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khattab, from Al-Hakam ibn Miskin, from Yunus ibn Ya'qub Al-Bajali.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن يونس بن يعقوب فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن الحكم بن مسكين، عن يونس ابن يعقوب البجليّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Yaqtin
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Yaqtin has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Yaqtin, from his brother Al-Husayn, from their father Ali ibn Yaqtin.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عليّ بن يقطين فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن عليّ بن يقطين، عن أخيه الحسين عن أبيه عليّ بن يقطين‌.

records.chapter: Larification of the Transmission Chain to rifa'ah Ibn Musa Al-Nakhkhas
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Rifa'ah ibn Musa Al-Nakhkhas has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Rifa'ah ibn Musa Al-Nakhkhas.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن رفاعة بن موسى النخّاس فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن رفاعة بن موسى النخّاس‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ziyad Ibn Suwqah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ziyad ibn Suwqah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ayyub ibn Nuh, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Ziyad ibn Suwqah.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن زياد بن سوقة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن أيّوب بن نوح، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن زياد بن سوقة.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hammad Ibn Uthman
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hammad ibn Uthman has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Hammad ibn Uthman.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه، عن حمّاد بن عثمان فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن حمّاد بن عثمان‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Yasir the Servant
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Yasir, the servant of Imam Al-Rida (as), has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Yasir, the servant of Imam Al-Rida (as).
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن ياسر الخادم فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن ياسر خادم الرّضا عليه السّلام‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Mahbub
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari and Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الحسن بن محبوب فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ؛ و سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد ابن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Dawud Ibn Abi Zayd
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Dawud ibn Abi Zayd has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn 'Isa ibn 'Ubayd, from Dawud ibn Abi Zayd.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن داود بن أبي زيد فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن عيسى بن عبيد، عن داود بن أبي زيد.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Bijil
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Bijil has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Hasan ibn Matil Al-Daqqaq, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khattab, from Abu Abdullah Al-Hakam ibn Miskin Al-Thaqafi, from Ali ibn Bijil ibn Aqil Al-Kufi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عليّ بن بجيل فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسن بن متّيل الدّقّاق، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن أبي عبد اللّه‌ الحكم بن مسكين الثّقفيّ، عن عليّ بن بجيل بن عقيل الكوفيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to mu'awiyah Ibn 'ammar
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn 'Ammar has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Safwan ibn Yahya and Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr together, from Mu'awiyah ibn 'Ammar Al-Dahni Al-Ghanawi Al-Kufi, the freed servant (mawla) of Bujaylah, and he was known by the kunya Abu Al-Qasim.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن معاوية بن عمّار فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن صفوان بن يحيى؛ و محمّد بن أبي عمير جميعا عن معاوية بن عمّار الدّهنيّ الغنويّ الكوفيّ مولى بجيلة و يكنّى أبا القاسم‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Qarin
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Qarin has been transmitted by me from Hamzah ibn Muhammad Al-Alawi - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Al-Hasan ibn Qarin.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الحسن بن قارن فقد رويته عن حمزة بن محمّد العلويّ- رحمه اللّه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن الحسن بن قارن‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Fadalah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abdullah ibn Fadalah has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Al-Husayn Al-Sa'dabadi, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Bandar ibn Hammad, from Abdullah ibn Fadalah.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عبد اللّه بن فضالة فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن الحسين السعدآباديّ، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن خالد، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن بندار بن حمّاد، عن عبد اللّه بن فضالة.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Khalid Ibn Najeeh
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Everything in this book that is narrated from Khalid ibn Najeeh has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Khalid ibn Najeeh Al-Jawwan.
[Clarification of the transmission chain to Al-Hasan ibn Al-Sirri]
بيان الطريق إلى الحسن بن السّريّ‌
حسن على وجه
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن خالد بن نجيح فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه‌ ابن جعفر الحميريّ، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن ابن أبي عمير، عن خالد بن نجيح الجوّان‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Khalid Ibn Najeeh
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Al-Sirri has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Hasan ibn Matil Al-Daqqaq, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khattab, from Ja'far ibn Bashir, from Al-Hasan ibn Al-Sirri.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الحسن بن السّريّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسن بن متّيل الدّقّاق، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر ابن بشير، عن الحسن بن السّريّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Abbas Ibn Hilal
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Abbas ibn Hilal has been transmitted by me from Al-Husayn ibn Ibrahim ibn Natanah - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Al-Abbas ibn Hilal.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن العبّاس بن هلال فقد رويته عن الحسين بن إبراهيم بن ناتانة- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن العبّاس بن هلال‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Harith Ibn Al-Mughira Al-Nadri
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Harith ibn Al-Mughira Al-Nadri has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his father, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah, from his father, from Yunus ibn Abd Al-Rahman and Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr together, from Al-Harith ibn Al-Mughira Al-Nadri.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الحارث بن المغيرة النضريّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن أبيه، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه، عن أبيه، عن يونس ابن عبد الرّحمن، و محمّد بن أبي عمير جميعا عن الحارث بن المغيرة النضريّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abu Bakr Al-Hadrami and Kulayb Al-Asadi
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abu Bakr Abdullah ibn Muhammad Al-Hadrami and Kulayb Al-Asadi has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khattab, from Abdullah ibn Abdur Rahman Al-Asam, from Abu Bakr Abdullah ibn Muhammad Al-Hadrami and Kulayb Al-Asadi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن أبي بكر الحضرميّ، و كليب الأسديّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن عبد اللّه بن عبد الرّحمن الأصم، عن أبي بكر عبد اللّه بن محمّد الحضرميّ؛ و كليب الأسديّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hisham Ibn Ibrahim
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hisham ibn Ibrahim has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Attar, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Hisham ibn Ibrahim, the companion of Imam Al-Ridha (as).
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن هشام بن إبراهيم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن هشام بن إبراهيم صاحب الرّضا عليه السّلام‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to the Narration of Bilal and the Reward of the mu'adhdhin (callers to prayer)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated about the story of Bilal and the complete account of the reward of the Mu'adhdhin has been transmitted by me from Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn Ja'far Al-Hamadani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from his father, from Ahmad ibn Al-Abbas and Al-Abbas ibn Amr Al-Fuqaymi, who both said: Hisham ibn Al-Hakam narrated to us, from Thabit ibn Hurmaz, from Al-Hasan ibn Abi Al-Hasan, from Ahmad ibn Abdul Hamid, from Abdullah ibn Ali, who said: "I carried my belongings from Basra to Egypt," and he mentioned the full narration in detail.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه من خبر بلال و ثواب المؤذّنين بطوله فقد رويته عن أحمد بن زياد بن جعفر الهمدانيّ- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن أحمد بن العبّاس؛ و العبّاس بن عمرو الفقيميّ قالا: حدّثنا هشام بن الحكم، عن ثابت بن هرمز، عن الحسن بن أبي الحسن، عن أحمد بن عبد الحميد، عن عبد اللّه بن عليّ قال: حملت متاعي من البصرة إلى مصر و ذكر الحديث بطوله‌.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Everything in this book that is narrated about the story of Bilal and the complete account of the reward of the Mu'adhdhin has been transmitted by me from Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn Ja'far Al-Hamadani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from his father, from Ahmad ibn Al-Abbas and Al-Abbas ibn Amr Al-Fuqaymi, who both said: Hisham ibn Al-Hakam narrated to us, from Thabit ibn Hurmaz, from Al-Hasan ibn Abi Al-Hasan, from Ahmad ibn Abdul Hamid, from Abdullah ibn Ali, who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "I carried my belongings from Basra to Egypt," and he mentioned the full narration in detail.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Fadl Ibn Shadhan Regarding the Causes (reasons) Mentioned From Imam Al-Ridha {a.s}
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Fadl ibn Shadhan regarding the causes (reasons) he mentioned from Imam Al-Ridha (as) has been transmitted by me from Abdul Wahid ibn Abduws Al-Naysaburi Al-Attar - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Qutaybah, from Al-Fadl ibn Shadhan Al-Naysaburi, from Imam Al-Ridha (as).
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الفضل بن شاذان من العلل الّتي ذكرها عن الرّضا عليه السّلام فقد رويته عن عبد الواحد بن عبدوس النّيسابوريّ العطّار- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ ابن محمّد بن قتيبة، عن الفضل بن شاذان النيسابوريّ، عن الرّضا عليه السّلام‌.
